sentences.english: Some educators argue that homework should be abolished entirely.
sentences.korean: 일부 교육자들은 숙제를 완전히 폐지해야 한다고 주장합니다.

sentences.english: I disagree that homework should be completely abolished but I do think it needs to be reformed.
sentences.korean: 숙제를 완전히 폐지하는 데는 반대하지만 개혁이 필요하다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: The problem isn't homework itself — it's the type and amount of homework being assigned.
sentences.korean: 문제는 숙제 자체가 아니라 내주는 숙제의 유형과 양이에요.

sentences.english: Meaningful assignments that encourage independent thinking and real-world application are extremely valuable.
sentences.korean: 독립적 사고와 실생활 적용을 장려하는 의미 있는 과제는 매우 가치 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Eating at Home vs. Eating Out

sentences.english: But repetitive worksheets that take hours without building real understanding should definitely be eliminated.
sentences.korean: 하지만 실질적 이해를 쌓지 못하면서 몇 시간이나 걸리는 반복적 학습지는 확실히 없애야 해요.

sentences.english: The focus should shift from quantity to quality so students can learn effectively without sacrificing their free time and mental health.
sentences.korean: 양에서 질로 초점이 바뀌어야 학생들이 여가와 정신 건강을 희생하지 않고 효과적으로 배울 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Book That Changed Your Thinking
